name: video-scraper
description: Lightweight random video player with automatic multi-source collection.

scripts.deploy: npm run config:production && npm run db:migrate:production && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.production.jsonc
scripts.db:migrate:production: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --config wrangler.production.jsonc
scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm run check:audit && npm run check:bundle
